title: helichrysum palustre
intro: Helichrysum palustre, also known as Marsh Helichrysum, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Helichrysum palustre can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
